LANDSPOUT. INITIAL UPDRAFTS OF DEVELOPING THUNDERSTORMS INTERACTED WITH AN OUTFLOW BOUNDARY AND PRODUCED A LANDSPOUT TORNADO, WHICH WAS ON THE GROUND FOR APPROXIMATELY 10-15 MINS. NUMEROUS PHOTOS ON SOCIAL MEDIA SHOWED A DUSTY LANDSPOUT. THIS PRECEDED THE DEVELOPMENT OF A MESOCYCLONIC TORNADO.

A TORNADO WAS CONFIRMED BY AN INDUVIAL WHO PICKED UP IN A TRUCK, ROTATED 120 DEGREES, HAD HIS WINDOWS BLOWN OUT, AND MIRRORS RIPPED OFF. HE REPORTED THAT THE TORNADO WAS ROUGHLY THE SIZE OF TRUCK. HE REPORTED POWER LINES DOWN. THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY LOCAL AUTHORITIES.
